title: SARIF AI emit profile — invocation object
description: Input contract for a single fully-formed SARIF invocation an AI producer supplies to the add-invocation verb. An overlay on the canonical SARIF 2.1.0 invocation: it reuses the base shape by $ref and tightens it for the AI profile. An invocation models one process the producer launched, emitted as a self-contained subtree at completion; this is the only path a producer has to populate run.invocations[], and notifications travel INLINE on toolExecutionNotifications/toolConfigurationNotifications (the add-notification verb was removed because SARIF has no run-level notifications array and a streamed notification cannot be routed to one of several parallel invocations). executionSuccessful and commandLine are required; the verb auto-stamps endTimeUtc and any notification timeUtc it leaves unset at emit time, so those are not required here.

executionSuccessful.description: Whether the process the invocation models completed successfully. Required by both SARIF §3.20.21 and the AI profile.

commandLine.description: The command line that launched the process this invocation models. Required by the AI profile (it is the natural identity of a launched process) even though SARIF §3.20.4 makes it optional.
